message:
fix(cli): prevent nil pointer dereference in ResolveCassContext

ResolveCassContext was accessing cfg.CASS.Context fields without first
checking if cfg was nil. While the function had a nil check for the
binary path option, it unconditionally accessed cfg.CASS.Context.MaxSessions
and cfg.CASS.Context.LookbackDays later in the function.

This fix introduces a local activeCfg variable that falls back to
config.Default() when cfg is nil, preventing potential nil pointer
dereferences.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
